title: delphinium menziesii subsp. ochroleucum
intro: Delphinium menziesii subsp. ochroleucum, also known as Menzies' delphinium or white delphinium, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Delphinium in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The plant's health benefits include potential uses in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Delphinium menziesii subsp. ochroleucum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically used to treat various health conditions.
